- Review arrivals, departures, and guest issues needing follow-up in the next 72 hours.
- Flag unresolved maintenance, housekeeping, concierge, F&B, or front-office actions.
- Surface event or group-stay items missing guest count, timing, payment, or operational ownership.
- If nothing material changed, reply `HEARTBEAT_OK`.
